title: Retirement at 23?
scenario: Retirement feels decades away at 23, and your colleagues laugh when you bring it up. But you read that starting a small long-horizon contribution now, even ₹2,000 a month, could grow far larger than starting the same amount ten years later, thanks to compounding.

choices.label: Start a small ₹2,000/month long-horizon retirement contribution now
choices.lesson: Time is the most powerful lever in compounding. Starting young means your money, not just your salary, does the heavy lifting.

choices.label: Wait until you earn more in a few years before thinking about retirement
choices.lesson: Delaying retirement saving by even a decade can roughly halve your final corpus. The earliest rupees compound the longest.
